use_codes.desc: FOR THE TREATMENT OF HEPATITIS C
FOR THE TREATMENT OF GENOTYPE 1, 2, 3 OR 4 CHRONIC HEPATITIS C VIRUS (HCV) INFECTION AS A COMPONENT OF A COMBINATION ANTIVIRAL TREATMENT REGIMEN WITH RIBAVIRIN

indications.text:
SOVALDI is a hepatitis C virus (HCV) nucleotide analog NS5B polymerase inhibitor
indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C (CHC) infection as a component of a
combination antiviral treatment regimen.
• SOVALDI efficacy has been established in subjects with HCV genotype 1, 2, 3 or
4 infectio...

SOVALDI is a hepatitis C virus (HCV) nucleotide analog NS5B polymerase inhibitor
indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C (CHC) infection as a component of a
combination antiviral treatment regimen.
• SOVALDI efficacy has been established in subjects with HCV genotype 1, 2, 3 or
4 infectio...

SOVALDI is indicated for the treatment of genotype 1, 2, 3 or 4 chronic hepatitis C virus
(HCV) infection as a component of a combination antiviral treatment regimen [see
Clinical Studies (14)].
